title: Registry Skill frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a Registry SKILL.md. Top-level additionalProperties is true so vendored upstream fields are preserved verbatim (spec §6.3). The metadata.mind.* subschema rejects unknown keys.

license.description: SPDX identifier or plain license name; must agree with the package LICENSE.txt.

compatibility.description: Descriptive harness/network/dependency constraints. Not an authorization grant.

allowed-tools.description: Capability request, never an authorization grant.

metadata.description: String-to-string map. Mind extensions live under mind.* keys. All values are strings (JSON arrays encoded as strings).
metadata.$comment: Unknown `mind.*` keys are rejected by scripts/validate_skills.py (the authoritative gate); this schema validates structure + the recognized `mind.*` keys listed below but CANNOT reject arbitrary `mind.`-prefixed keys because metadata is a flat string-to-string map and JSON Schema `additionalProperties` cannot isolate a key-prefix namespace. Use the Python validator as the closed-set mind.* gate. `patternProperties` formalizes that any `mind.`-prefixed value, when present, must be a string.

mind.id.description: Stable reverse-domain reconciliation key (e.g. ai.medrix.skill.sop-builder). Never changes, never reused.

mind.distribution.description: builtin maps to platform_builtin; marketplace maps directly; unknown rejected.

mind.market-primary.description: Primary Marketplace category slug; must appear in mind.market-categories if present.

mind.market-categories.description: JSON array of category slugs encoded as a string.

mind.marketplace-summary.description: Optional display summary overridable by Webadmin.

mind.publisher.description: Optional display publisher overridable by Webadmin.

mind.runtime-category.description: Optional artifact/runtime enum (report, ppt, html, flashcard, slides, markdown, video). Not a Marketplace category.

mind.tags.description: JSON array of tags encoded as a string.

mind.upstream.import-mode.description: How the upstream content was imported.

mind.upstream.evidence-urls.description: JSON array of immutable evidence URLs encoded as a string.
